recommendations.title: The Mermaid: Lake of the Dead
recommendations.overview: An evil Mermaid falls in love with Marina's fiancé Roman and aims to keep him away from Marina in her Kingdom of Death under water. The Mermaid is a young woman who drowned a few centuries ago. Marina only has one week to overcome her fear of the dar

recommendations.title: Perdida
recommendations.overview: A policewoman whose childhood friend disappeared in Patagonia years ago starts a new search to find answers, and soon finds her own life in danger.

recommendations.title: Drishyam
recommendations.overview: A simple street-smart man tries to protect his family from a cop looking for her missing son who was accidently killed by his daughter.

recommendations.title: Marina Abramović: The Artist Is Present
recommendations.overview: Performance artist Marina Abramovic prepares for a major retrospective of her work at the Museum of Modern Art in New York.

recommendations.title: The Wedding Unplanner
recommendations.overview: Marina is a woman in her thirties who works organizing weddings. Not because she is an inveterate romantic just because, as she says, "when people are in love, they don't care about money". Unlike her customers, she enjoys a life without ties or comm

recommendations.title: The Hummingbird
recommendations.overview: Everyone in Marco's life seems constantly restless, from his brilliant but unhappily married parents to his own wife Marina, or even Luisa, the real love of his life, a girl he met during a fateful summer in the '70s and always stayed in touch with.

recommendations.title: A Fantastic Woman
recommendations.overview: Marina's life is thrown into turmoil following the death of her partner. Mourning the loss of the man she loved, she finds herself under intense scrutiny from those with no regard for her privacy.

recommendations.title: The Forgiven
recommendations.overview: Over a weekend in the High Atlas Mountains of Morocco, a random accident reverberates through the lives of both the local Muslims and Western visitors to a house party in a grand villa.

recommendations.title: Les Cowboys
recommendations.overview: Drama about a father and son who set out to find their missing daughter/sister with the help of an American headhunter.

recommendations.title: Udaan
recommendations.overview: Upon returning to his industrial hometown, a young man must decide whether to follow his own dreams or acquiesce to his father's plans for his future.
